{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Monarch of the Hungry Deep
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Monarch of the Hungry Deep]] prefers specific and immediate information.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Monarch of the Hungry Deep]] fought the [[Bleeding Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
